payload.answer: Cannot execute the SQL debug command because admin SQL access is disabled when BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution needed; the input is an administrative SQL request, not a memory update or retrieval about a person/place/thing.

details: Recognized an admin SQL command targeting memory_cards.
Detected that SQL debugging is disabled by configuration.
Did not create or modify any durable memory.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the appropriate debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use non-SQL Brain inspection/debug commands that are allowed when SQL debugging is disabled.
If you only need memory contents, request a supported memory export or listing endpoint instead of raw SQL.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql_debug_request","decision":"deny_execution","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No entity resolution needed; the input is an administrative SQL request, not a memory update or retrieval about a person/place/thing."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Cannot execute the SQL debug command because admin SQL access is disabled when BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.","citations":["/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards","BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false"],"repair_options":["Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the appropriate debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.","Use non-SQL Brain inspection/debug commands that are allowed when SQL debugging is disabled.","If you only need memory contents, request a supported memory export or listing endpoint instead of raw SQL."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Recognized an admin SQL command targeting memory_cards.","Detected that SQL debugging is disabled by configuration.","Did not execute SQL.","Did not create or modify any durable memory."]}}
